title: User has_one Profile — correct has_one direction
prompt: Build MyApp.Accounts.User (fields: email, name) with a has_one association to MyApp.Accounts.Profile (fields: bio, avatar_url). Foreign key user_id lives on the profile side (Profile has belongs_to :user). Write both modules to lib/my_app/accounts/user.ex.
tier_rationale: Single has_one/belongs_to pair, direction obvious from context.
